tone: Convenient, routine — your regular spot where you know what to expect
hook_formula: Your usual table is waiting. Come back and enjoy your favorite dishes, on us, as a thank you for your loyalty.
cta_style: Soft, non-pressuring. We're here for you, whenever you need your routine fix.
visual_direction: Familiar, consistent visuals showcasing the convenience and reliability of the venue
india_adjustment: Indian office workers show routine dining patterns driven by convenience and time scarcity, making habit formation a key driver
dont: Never use messages or visuals that might disrupt the routine or make it seem less convenient

tone: Socially-driven, vibrant, and lively atmosphere, with a focus on moderate spend and frequent visits
hook_formula: Exciting events, new experiences, and social sharing opportunities to create a buzz around the venue
cta_style: Inviting and inclusive, encouraging customers to join the social scene
visual_direction: Vibrant colors, lively atmosphere, and visually appealing dishes to create a shareable experience
india_adjustment: High-potential validated archetype for the Indian urban context, with a focus on socially-driven and frequency-oriented dining
dont: Never use solitary or quiet atmosphere

tone: Social, vibrant, and lively — appealing to the desire for group dining and social interaction
hook_formula: High-energy atmosphere, group outings, and social sharing opportunities
cta_style: Inviting and inclusive, emphasizing the fun of group dining
visual_direction: Vibrant colors, group photos, and lively ambiance
india_adjustment: Indian middle-class shows strong social dining motivation, with 'food as identity' driving group outings
dont: Never use solitary or quiet visuals

tone: Healthy, balanced, and values-driven — a venue that aligns with your lifestyle
hook_formula: Find a venue that fits your lifestyle, where you can be yourself and feel good
cta_style: Join our community, where like-minded people come together
visual_direction: Natural decor, healthy food options, and wellness-focused activities to create a balanced atmosphere
india_adjustment: In India, lifestyle regulars often look for venues with a strong focus on health and wellness, so highlighting these aspects can be beneficial
dont: Avoid overly indulgent or unhealthy visuals
Never use language that implies a lack of values alignment

tone: Safety, no surprises — familiar environment is the draw, not the food
hook_formula: Environment confidence + consistency. Quiet corner, your usual, nobody rushes you.
cta_style: Soft, non-pressuring. Your regular table is waiting.
visual_direction: Quiet corner, soft lighting, consistent plating, clean visible hygiene
india_adjustment: Post-pandemic 61% prefer familiar environments; safety signal essential especially for women

tone: Sophisticated, high-end experience with independent choices
hook_formula: Exclusive experience + high-end quality. Personalized service and unique offerings.
cta_style: Upscale, inviting to a premium experience
visual_direction: High-end ambiance, sophisticated decor, and premium products
india_adjustment: High spenders in India may prioritize exclusivity and status, with a preference for private word-of-mouth over public social media
dont: Avoid peer pressure or conformity language
Never use low-end or casual visuals

tone: Curious, adventurous, and open-minded — appealing to the desire for novelty and exploration
hook_formula: New experiences, unique flavors, and exploration opportunities
cta_style: Inviting and encouraging, emphasizing the thrill of discovery
visual_direction: Vibrant colors, new and exciting settings, and diverse menu options
india_adjustment: Indian urban diners show increasing cuisine experimentation, with 20% more cuisines explored annually
dont: Never use familiar or routine visuals

tone: Familiar, convenient, and reliable — emphasizing the comfort of routine and loyalty
hook_formula: Consistency, familiarity, and ease of repeat visits
cta_style: Soft, non-pressuring, and welcoming, emphasizing the benefits of loyalty
visual_direction: Warm colors, familiar settings, and predictable menu options
india_adjustment: Mumbai data shows frequent diners exhibit routine behavior, with high loyalty and predictable spend
dont: Never use unexpected or experimental visuals

tone: Exclusive, high-status experience — for those who want to be seen and experience the latest trends
hook_formula: Be one of the select few who get to experience the newest, most exclusive offerings. Limited time only.
cta_style: Exclusive, urgent. Don't miss your chance to be part of the elite group that gets to experience this first.
visual_direction: High-end, luxurious visuals showcasing the exclusivity and scarcity of the experience
india_adjustment: Urban Indian middle-class uses dining out as a status marker, making identity signaling crucial for this archetype
dont: Never use visuals or messages that might make the experience seem common or easily accessible

tone: Exploratory, adventurous, and open to new experiences — a venue that offers something unique
hook_formula: Discover a new world, explore the unknown, and experience the unconventional
cta_style: Come and explore, be one of the first to discover
visual_direction: Unconventional decor, unique lighting, and eclectic music to create an exploratory atmosphere
india_adjustment: In India, scene seekers often look for venues with a mix of traditional and modern elements, so highlighting these aspects can be beneficial
dont: Avoid overly familiar or traditional visuals
Never use language that implies routine or predictability
